subcodes.first_line: O servant! Most faces have turned black on this Naw-Rúz, wherein the Sun hath risen from the horizon [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا عبد قد اسودت اکثر الوجوه فی هذا النیروز الذی فیه اشرقت الشمس عن برج
subcodes.subjects: @power of prayer, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @spiritual transformation, @suffering and imprisonment
